buildSummary: Skia works best in Incantation-aligned comps where attack value is prioritized.

diskSets.name: The Rain That Shook the World (S)
diskSets.note: Strong general DPS Arc for burst carries with reliable damage scaling.

diskSets.name: First Step to Success (A)
diskSets.note: Accessible bridge Arc for early progression while farming better S options.

modules.name: S-tier Module line
modules.note: Prioritize CRIT/ATK rolls for burst consistency.

modules.name: A-tier Module fallback
modules.note: Use ATK + Cycle Rate until best rolls drop.

farming.name: Esper EXP materials
farming.tip: Spend daily stamina here first until your main DPS hits next ascension cap.

farming.name: Weapon/Arc upgrade mats
farming.tip: Farm on days matching your Arc upgrade route before side content.

farming.name: Module enhancement chips
farming.tip: Use these after EXP/Arc mats; module gains are strongest mid/late progression.
